description: nitp.ac.in is the website of the National Institute of Technology Patna, an Indian public technical institute. The site provides institutional, academic, admissions, and campus information and links to internal portals.
summary: No public developer integration surface found for nitp.ac.in; the site appears to be an institutional website with links to internal portals on other domains/subdomains, but no documented public API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI on nitp.ac.in.
